title: [codereview] coap_dtn.c: coap_respond and handlers lack DTN/SenML provider callback integration and robustness
description: Handlers still return 0 instead of using coap_respond(COAP_RESPONSE_CODE_*, ...). No use of lichen_dtn_* or senml_encode_* per spec and bead title. Missing include may still be needed for full COAP_RESPONSE_CODE_* resolution (see coap_location.c which uses additional headers). No logging on errors. Fix all before closing main bead. lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:14
notes: Completed 3 codereview passes (beads umjp,zc65,ofd4,ie0v,vq1c filed+fixed with logging, robustness, shared lichen_coap_respond integration, SenML content-format, error handling per spec). All findings addressed. 3 clean passes with no P0-P2 issues.
close_reason: All 5 P0 fixed per spec after 3 codereview passes per chunk (storage/SenML, rate limit, POST OSCORE, GET, init/expiry). No comments, init graph followed, per-IID rate limit, OSCORE unprotect+ctx lookup, SenML+TTL+lichen_dtn_retrieve_for, full tests passed (pytest/cargo/native_sim).
